sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a cold, left hand pain, and chest pain. He also reports a slight fever and thought they had a slight fever. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports a cold. The patient traveled over the last week or so. The patient reports left hand pain. The patient reports chest pain. The patient thought they had a slight fever. The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. Cervical lymphadenopathy is present on exam.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a cold, left hand pain, and chest pain. The patient is positive for covid. The patient has cervical lymphadenopathy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders a lipid panel in six months. The doctor advises the patient to quarantine for 10 days. The patient should continue taking crestor 20 milligrams a day. The patient has received both stages of the covid vaccine.
